ogTitle: Caroline Springs vs Carrajung: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caroline Springs and Carrajung.
heading: Caroline Springs vs Carrajung — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caroline Springs, Victoria and Carrajung, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carrajung has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Caroline Springs (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caroline Springs or Carrajung safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caroline Springs has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Carrajung scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caroline Springs scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Carrajung scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caroline Springs or Carrajung?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carrajung has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
